# Adb Gui Next v0.2.5

This release adds macOS support and includes the latest UI, release, and Android workflow improvements.

## Downloads

Recommended downloads:

- Windows x64: `AdbGuiNext-v0.2.5-windows-x64-setup.exe`
- macOS universal: `AdbGuiNext-v0.2.5-macos-universal.dmg`
- Linux x64 Debian/Ubuntu: `AdbGuiNext-v0.2.5-linux-x64.deb`
- Linux x64 RPM: `AdbGuiNext-v0.2.5-linux-x64.rpm`

Advanced downloads:

- Windows x64 MSI: `AdbGuiNext-v0.2.5-windows-x64.msi`
- Windows x64 portable zip: `AdbGuiNext-v0.2.5-windows-x64-portable.zip`

Use `SHA256SUMS.txt` to verify downloaded files.

## Highlights

- Added macOS desktop packaging with universal DMG release assets.
- Added bundled macOS Android platform tools for ADB, fastboot, and related utilities.
- Added dynamic frontend layout adaptivity for a better desktop experience across supported platforms.
- Improved Flasher card layout spacing and recovery sideload drop-zone alignment.
- Simplified the Emulator Root wizard into Preflight, Setup, Patching, and Verify stages.
- Added tabbed Emulator Root setup for automated Magisk patching and manual FAKEBOOTIMG fallback.
- Preserved manual preflight control so users explicitly start scans and continue setup.
- Improved Marketplace layout by keeping sidebar/search fixed while content scrolls independently.

## Platform Support

- Windows x64: first-class.
- Linux x64: first-class.
- macOS universal: newly supported.
- ARM/x86 32-bit builds: not shipped in v0.2.5.

## Notes

- macOS builds are ad-hoc signed unless project signing secrets are configured in the release workflow.
- Windows portable zip is for advanced users. The installer is recommended for normal use.
- Windows portable zip requires Microsoft Edge WebView2 Runtime to already be installed or available on the system.
- ADB and fastboot are bundled. System-installed ADB/fastboot are fallback paths only.
- Some advanced workflows require a real connected Android device, fastboot mode, recovery sideload mode, or an installed Android SDK for emulator operations.
